craigslist.title: Studio/1B, Secured Entrance, Laundry Facilities
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post 606 3rd Ave, San Diego, CA 92101 Located in the heart of downtown San Diego, Market Street Square is surrounded by the eclectic charm of a neighborhood full of history, outstanding shopping, fine dining and an enviable nightlife. Our lively community is within walking distance of Horton Plaza, the historic Gaslamp Quarter, San Diego Trolley line, PetCo Park Baseball Stadium, and just a short distance from the San Diego Bay. Our light and spacious studio, one- and two-bedroom apartment homes provide a comfortable retreat after a long day. Amenities such as a sparkling swimming pool, a dry heat sauna, two rooftop sundecks, a Jacuzzi spa and deluxe fitness center provide first-class living all the way. Market Street Square is the ideal place to call home. Choose from a variety of floor plan options to match your needs, and rest assured each of our thoughtfully designed apartments is packed with contemporary necessities and sophisticated touches. The open-concept layouts at Market Street Square leave plenty of room for your belongings, your lifestyle, and your aesthetic. Beyond your doorstep, we’ve curated a selection of resort-style community perks that will inspire you to plan your next vacation as a staycation. You’ll find spaces to relax and unwind and places to gather with friends. Features Include: Recreation Room Jacuzzi Sauna Barbecue Area Courtesy Guard Secured Entrance Laundry Facilities 2 Rooftop Sundecks Fitness Center Swimming Pool Call: show contact info For more information, visit us at: https://livegkmanagement.com/5u4e4uaz/market-st-square Pricing and availability are subject to change daily. craigslist.title: Renovated UTC Area 1 Bed + Included AC, Pet Spaces & Gorgeous Views
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Experience the charm of Canyon Park, an upgraded community offering a variety of floorplans to suit your lifestyle. Enjoy stunning canyon views and the perfect weather while relaxing on your private balcony or exploring nearby hiking trails. The community features modern amenities such as central air conditioning, fans, and new flooring, ensuring comfort year-round. Residents can take advantage of the thriving local art scene, upscale dining options, and a foodie paradise just minutes away. For outdoor enthusiasts, biking and jogging trails provide a great way to stay active, and the nearby beach offers additional leisure opportunities. Feature List Pets Welcome, Nearby Beaches, Job Centers, Shopping, Dining & UCSD, Nearby Trolley Transportation, Minutes from Beautiful San Diego Beaches, Recently Updated, Private Patio/Balcony, Central Air Conditioning, On-Site Maintenance, Billiards Table, Outdoor Hot Tub, Bike & Jogging Trail, Fitness Center The community is pet-friendly and equipped with full-size appliances, making daily living convenient and enjoyable. With close proximity to I-5 and I-805, commuting to UC San Diego, UTC San Diego, and numerous job centers is effortless. Recreational amenities like a pool table and billiards table add to the inviting atmosphere, while the scenic coastal vistas create a perfect backdrop for everyday life. Whether you're exploring the local culture or simply relaxing at home, Canyon Park offers a vibrant, upgraded living experience in a prime location. Call us today! Canyon Park Phone: show contact info

craigslist.title: Now 1 MONTH OFF - Nature-Focused + Mission Trails Regional Park
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Cajon Villa Call Us Now! show contact info - Wood-Inspired Flooring - Proximity to Restaurants, Shops, and Parks. - Balcony/Patio - Large Living Spaces - Fireplace - Assigned Covered Parking - Beautifully Crafted Community - Ceiling Fans - Laundry Care Center - BBQ Grill & Picnic Area - Pool & Lounge Area Experience the comfort and serenity of living at Cajon Villa, where thoughtfully designed interiors create a welcoming atmosphere. Each apartment features spacious walk-in closets, bright spaces filled with natural sunlight, and modern finishes that add warmth and sophistication. Cozy evenings can be enjoyed by the fireplace, while central air and heat ensure year-round comfort. Our lush landscaping and peaceful outdoor spaces, like the Butterfly Garden at Cuyamaca College, provide tranquil retreats for residents. Conveniently located just 17 miles east of downtown San Diego, Cajon Villa offers easy access to schools, shopping, dining, and parks, making everyday errands simple and enjoyable. We are an Equal Housing Opportunity Community. The community hosts events such as America on Main Street, fostering a vibrant neighborhood spirit. With proximity to Grossmont College and Cuyamaca College, educational needs are well served, and the area's cultural celebrations reflect El Cajon's lively community. Whether you're seeking a large one-, two-, or three-bedroom layout, Cajon Villa redefines what it means to feel at home. Live better and discover the perfect space tailored to your lifestyle in this prime El Cajon location.

craigslist.title: $1,850 / 2 Bedrooms - OPEN HOUSE: 6/30 11:30AM-12:30PM in San Diego with Parking
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Here is the rewritten listing with the requested changes applied. 2 Bedrooms, 1.5 Bath in Pacific Beach with 2 Assigned Parking and Onsite Laundry Available Now Open house this Saturday from 11:30am to 12:30pm; times may change. Located on the second floor, this 2-bedroom, 1.5-bath apartment places you close to everything Pacific Beach has to offer. The unit features an updated kitchen, excellent natural light, 2 assigned parking spaces, and onsite laundry. Water, sewer, and trash are included in the rent; tenants pay gas and electric. You are minutes from popular spots like Tourmaline Surfing Park, Crystal Pier, and Kate Sessions Park. Garnet Avenue provides shopping, dining, and nightlife. Coffee and breakfast options are nearby at local favorites. No pets allowed; assistive animals only. No cosigners. Applicants must have verifiable monthly income of 2.5 times the rent, good credit and rental history, a valid ID, and renters insurance. Security deposit is $250. This is a great chance to live in a desirable beach community in a well-appointed home. Feel free to reply with your contact details if you would like to learn more.

craigslist.title: 1B/1B, Fitness Center, Swimming Pool
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post 606 3rd Ave, San Diego, CA 92101 Located in the heart of downtown San Diego, Market Street Square is surrounded by the eclectic charm of a neighborhood full of history, outstanding shopping, fine dining and an enviable nightlife. Our lively community is within walking distance of Horton Plaza, the historic Gaslamp Quarter, San Diego Trolley line, PetCo Park Baseball Stadium, and just a short distance from the San Diego Bay. Our light and spacious studio, one- and two-bedroom apartment homes provide a comfortable retreat after a long day. Amenities such as a sparkling swimming pool, a dry heat sauna, two rooftop sundecks, a Jacuzzi spa and deluxe fitness center provide first-class living all the way. Market Street Square is the ideal place to call home. Choose from a variety of floor plan options to match your needs, and rest assured each of our thoughtfully designed apartments is packed with contemporary necessities and sophisticated touches. The open-concept layouts at Market Street Square leave plenty of room for your belongings, your lifestyle, and your aesthetic. Beyond your doorstep, we’ve curated a selection of resort-style community perks that will inspire you to plan your next vacation as a staycation. You’ll find spaces to relax and unwind and places to gather with friends. Located close to major highways, shopping, dining, and cultural venues, Casa La Mesa combines comfort, accessibility, and a high quality of life in the East County region of San Diego.

craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Vista Del Coronado show contact info 125.5th Ave Bed: 1 Bath: 1 Pricing: 1900 Vista Del Coronado offers spacious one, two, and three-bedroom apartment homes designed to feel just like home. Residents enjoy private patios, central air conditioning, and ample in-home storage, making everyday living comfortable and convenient. The community boasts green courtyard views and top-notch amenities, including sparkling pools and resort-style outdoor lounges perfect for relaxation. Located in Chula Vista, the city is renowned for its stunning coastal landscapes, rolling hills, canyons, and parks, providing endless outdoor activities for outdoor enthusiasts. The area is rich in cultural, economic, and environmental diversity, with easy access to shopping centers, dining options, schools, and parks. Just minutes from the 5 freeway and San Diego Bay, residents can easily explore local attractions like the Chula Vista Marina and the Bayshore Bikeway. Chula Vista is also a leader in conservation and renewable energy, reflecting its commitment to sustainability. Whether enjoying sunny days at the pools or exploring nearby wildlife refuges and bike trails, Vista Del Coronado offers a lifestyle filled with comfort and adventure. craigslist.title: Charming duplex in Pacific Beach with private yard for rent
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Charming duplex in Pacific Beach with private yard! This charming duplex is located in the Pacific Beach neighborhood and comes with a large privately enclosed yard. We are in the process of a remodel that includes full paint inside and outside the cottage, new windows & window coverings and more. The kitchen is equipped with a gas stove and fridge and a pass through window into the living room. Large windows filter in plenty of natural sunlight. There is a large covered patio with washer/dryer hookups. We just completed install of a new mini-split with AC and new windows. Please text me your number so I can send the details.

craigslist.title: Recreation Room, Barbecue Area, Secured Entrance
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post 606 3rd Ave, San Diego, CA 92101 Located in the heart of downtown San Diego, Market Street Square is surrounded by the eclectic charm of a neighborhood full of history, outstanding shopping, fine dining and an enviable nightlife. Our lively community is within walking distance of Horton Plaza, the historic Gaslamp Quarter, San Diego Trolley line, PetCo Park Baseball Stadium, and just a short distance from the San Diego Bay. Our light and spacious studio, one- and two-bedroom apartment homes provide a comfortable retreat after a long day. Amenities such as a sparkling swimming pool, a dry heat sauna, two rooftop sundecks, a Jacuzzi spa and deluxe fitness center provide first-class living all the way. Market Street Square is the ideal place to call home. Choose from a variety of floor plan options to match your needs, and rest assured each of our thoughtfully designed apartments is packed with contemporary necessities and sophisticated touches. The open-concept layouts at Market Street Square leave plenty of room for your belongings, your lifestyle, and your aesthetic. craigslist.title: Fitness Center, Laundry Facilities, Sauna
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post 606 3rd Ave, San Diego, CA 92101 Located in the heart of downtown San Diego, Market Street Square is surrounded by the eclectic charm of a neighborhood full of history, outstanding shopping, fine dining and an enviable nightlife. Our lively community is within walking distance of Horton Plaza, the historic Gaslamp Quarter, San Diego Trolley line, PetCo Park Baseball Stadium, and just a short distance from the San Diego Bay. Our light and spacious studio, one- and two-bedroom apartment homes provide a comfortable retreat after a long day. Amenities such as a sparkling swimming pool, a dry heat sauna, two rooftop sundecks, a Jacuzzi spa and deluxe fitness center provide first-class living all the way. Market Street Square is the ideal place to call home. Choose from a variety of floor plan options to match your needs, and rest assured each of our thoughtfully designed apartments is packed with contemporary necessities and sophisticated touches. The open-concept layouts at Market Street Square leave plenty of room for your belongings, your lifestyle, and your aesthetic. Beyond your doorstep, we’ve curated a selection of resort-style community perks that will inspire you to plan your next vacation as a staycation. You’ll find spaces to relax and unwind and places to gather with friends. Features Include: Sauna Laundry Facilities Swimming Pool Recreation Room Fitness Center Jacuzzi Secured Entrance Courtesy Guard Barbecue Area 2 Rooftop Sundecks Call: show contact info For more information, visit us at: https://livegkmanagement.com/62fds4ta/market-st-square Pricing and availability are subject to change daily. Photos may not be of the exact advertised unit. Contact us today for the most up to date information.

craigslist.title: Jacuzzi, Laundry Facilities, Swimming Pool
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post 606 3rd Ave, San Diego, CA 92101 Located in the heart of downtown San Diego, Market Street Square is surrounded by the eclectic charm of a neighborhood full of history, outstanding shopping, fine dining and an enviable nightlife. Our lively community is within walking distance of Horton Plaza, the historic Gaslamp Quarter, San Diego Trolley line, PetCo Park Baseball Stadium, and just a short distance from the San Diego Bay. Our light and spacious studio, one- and two-bedroom apartment homes provide a comfortable retreat after a long day. Amenities such as a sparkling swimming pool, a dry heat sauna, two rooftop sundecks, a Jacuzzi spa and deluxe fitness center provide first-class living all the way. Market Street Square is the ideal place to call home. Choose from a variety of floor plan options to match your needs, and rest assured each of our thoughtfully designed apartments is packed with contemporary necessities and sophisticated touches. The open-concept layouts at Market Street Square leave plenty of room for your belongings, your lifestyle, and your aesthetic. Beyond your doorstep, we’ve curated a selection of resort-style community perks that will inspire you to plan your next vacation as a staycation. You’ll find spaces to relax and unwind and places to gather with friends. Become a regular at local favorites like Smokey and the Brisket, and enjoy everyday conveniences with Vons, Costco, Walmart, and Target just around the corner. PROPERTY AMENITIES ✓ Barbecue pavilion ✓ Bocce ball court ✓ Courtesy night patrol ✓ Fitness Center ✓ Media area ✓ Outdoor fireplace lounge ✓ Package Service ✓ Private garages available ✓ Wi-Fi in common areas ✓ 24-hour fitness center with free weights and cardio machines ✓ Amazon Locker: A convenient and contact-free package pickup solution available in your building 24/7 ✓ Co-working lounge with computers, small business capabilities, and Wi-Fi ✓ Relaxing resort-style pool with sundeck, spa, cabanas, and showers ✓ Resident social lounge with billiard table & kitchen with entertaining bar ✓ Virtual moving concierge - Complimentary address change, set up home services and digital moving announcements APARTMENT AMENITIES ✓ Built-In Bookshelves ✓ Built-in home office space ✓ Dual vanity sinks in primary baths ✓ Electronic thermostat ✓ Energy Star modern kitchen appliances ✓ Fireplace ✓ French doors leading to patio ✓ Furnished apartments available ✓ Garbage disposal ✓ Gourmet kitchen island ✓ In-home washer and dryer ✓ Kitchen ✓ Oversized double pane windows with 2-inch faux wood blinds ✓ Oversized walk-in closets with custom shelving ✓ Patio ✓ Polished granite countertops ✓ Recreation Room ✓ Separate dining rooms with track lighting ✓ USB charging outlets in kitchens ✓ Wood-style plank flooring throughout living spaces ADDITIONAL INFO Description: At Pulse Millenia Apartments, we offer an unparalleled selection of amenities designed to enhance every aspect of our residents' lives. Stay active and energized in our state-of-the-art fitness center, complete with cardio and strength training equipment. Entertain friends and family in our stylish clubhouse, featuring a gourmet kitchen and cozy lounge areas. For those who work from home or need a quiet space to focus, our business center provides the perfect environment. And for furry friends, our pet-friendly community includes a spacious dog park where they can play and socialize. With additional perks like controlled-access parking, package lockers, and on-site maintenance, Pulse Millenia ensures that every convenience is at your fingertips. Experience luxury living redefined with our exceptional amenities tailored to your lifestyle. Pet Policy: Pet Policy Overview Dogs and cats are welcome at our community. Contact office to confirm pricing details and included fees. 1 Bedroom 1 Bath | 750 sq ft Lease Terms: Variable Phone: show contact info What you'll find in our community! ◾ Barbecue/Grill ◾ Laundry On-site ◾ Off Street Parking ◾ Online Services ◾ On-Site Management ◾ Recycling ◾ Short Term Lease ◾ Spa/Hot Tub ◾ Beautiful Remodeled Club House ◾ Emergency Maintenance ◾ High Speed Internet ◾ On-Site Maintenance ◾ Peaceful Retreat-Like Atmosphere ◾ Public Transportation ◾ Renters Insurance Program ◾ Resort Style Pool & Spa ◾ Wi-Fi at Pool and Clubhouse Features in this apartment home! ◾ Accent Walls ◾ Air Conditioner ◾ Ceiling Fan ◾ Dishwasher ◾ Disposal ◾ Electronic Thermostat ◾ Hardwood Floors ◾ Large Closets ◾ Private Patios/Balconies ◾ Window Coverings More Information: Tucked away in the "Jewel of the Hills," Shasta Lane Apartments welcomes you with towering pine trees, the flutter of butterflies, and the gentle songs of birds. Step outside your door to explore nearby Lake Murray, where scenic trails and sparkling waters await. Become a regular at local favorites like Smokey and the Brisket, and enjoy everyday conveniences with Vons, Costco, Walmart, and Target just around the corner. For a little more adventure, stroll the charming La Mesa downtown village with boutique shops, events, and dining experiences. Our location makes it easy to enjoy all that San Diego County offers, with quick access to the I-8, I-15, 125, and 805 freeways. Whether it's beaches, amusement parks, or vibrant neighborhoods, everything is within reach. At home, relax in spacious apartments filled with natural light. Enjoy big windows, sliding glass doors to your private patio or balcony, and thoughtful touches like large wardrobe closets and included kitchen appliances. Stay connected with pre-installed WiFi from Cox, including one month of complimentary service at move-in. Take advantage of our 24-hour laundry facilities, assigned parking, pool, spa, and clubhouse. At Shasta Lane Apartments, you're going to love where you live! Pet Policy: Breed Restriction Weight Restriction Pet Friendly: Max 2 Allowed Rent $50.00 Deposit $400.00. All pets are subject to interview and management approval. Acceptable pets include cats, dogs, fish (50 gallon tank size limit with management's prior written authorization). craigslist.title: 2br 1.5bath RANCHETTE HOME ADU GRANNY FLAT QUITE SECLUSION POND CREEK
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Poway Lake | Ramona Lake | Mt Woodsen boarder 2Br 1.5Bath Granny Flat, guest house, studio, home on 80 acre Ranch, seclusion, private pond creek and Archie Moore's 1950's dam, waterfall, and pond on a private creek. Free water, free sewer, free propane/gas, and free trash, electricity is based on usage, washing machine hookups in unit. New appliance throughout, new fridge, new stove, new bath, 9' extra tall ceilings and air conditioning. History of the Ranch from CBS news: (Copy and past this into google) YouTube Archie Moore's Salt Mine in San Diego County in 1959 Sean 619 3OO 33 five1 Texting me your simple details is easiest for me. How many adults, kids, dogs cats, giraffes, what you do for employment, your favored lease length, ect. No drugs, non smoking, boring, law abiding, law enforcement friendly, and respectful, is what we're looking for. Standard background checks will be performed. If you have a current LIVE Scan available, or proof of military clearances, are big bonus'. Located in the middle of Archie Moore's old property and his "Salt Mine" Boxing Camp. The pad for his pools, 2 homes and boxing ring still rests under the 350 year old coastal oak trees. Your back yard and cultasac is the indoor training ring Mohamed Ali nick named the "Bucket of Blood", and is detailed in both of Archie and Mohamed's, World Champion Boxing Biography books. George Foreman trained and learned to box in these hills, along with numerous other world class boxers and Navy Golden Gloves over the years. The back yard and rest of the acreage is a resort with a waterfall that can put you to sleep at night. Mt Woodson Country Club, the "Million Dollar Golf Course Bridges", along with the Mt Woodson Castle is down your private drive. World class rock bouldering is at your fingertips in the front and back yards. The widely known, Mt Woodson Hiking Trail and Potatoe Chip Rock is a 5 minute drive away, or a hike down the back yard, with the Iron Mountain Hiking trail head 10 minutes down the road. You can hike directly to Potato Chip Rock from your back door, the Grass Land Preserve is around the corner and also hike able from your door, where a pair of Golden Eagles migrate in from Alaska to breed every year. The micro climate is like no other in Southern California. 360* of seclusion, and 80 acres of coastal oak trees surround you. The coastal marine layer often rolls past the back window in the evenings, through your canyon, as the photos show. 3 juvenile night time owls are a stones throws away to keep you company and sing you to sleep. Neighborly, pet chickens and organic eggs are a short walk across the way. Open access to a private tennis court may be available as well, if thats your thing. Mt Woodson Elementary School is biking distance for a 5th grader, and ranks 9 out of 10 in the state. Poway's, In-n-Out Burger, Costco and Home Depot are 12 minutes away, yet you're in the middle of the "Ramona Valley Vineyard Association" on the "West End" on your own private ranch with 100'snof open acres surrounding you. Commuting is a breeze compared to down town Poway or down town Ramona because there are no stop lights to contend with in the morning on Hwy 67. 1 stop light gets you Scripps Poway Parkway, and 7 more miles gets you to the 15 Freeway. It is the ideal commuting location to Qualcom, General Atomics, Claremont, Kearney Mesa, NAS Mira Mar Base, Mira Mesa, La Jolla, Sony, the Apple Campus, or north to Escondido and those hospitals and buisness parks. Optional RV, Trailer or Boat parking is available, but not included . Horse amenities are available as well. The round pen can be seen in the helicopter arial image. It's a property that most folks spend a lifetime of work and a career to be able to retire in. We'd like to share it with you. It truly is God's country, and the very place a ridiculously wealthy, World Champion, Light Heavy Weight Boxer (1952-1963), Archie Moore decided to call home. He could have lived anywhere in the world as he traveled to Paris, Peru, London and South America to fight in the late 1950's, yet, he chose this property to call home and to train on. I think I've layed it on thick enough, come take a gander for yourself, Ill give you the tour... Come, stretch out, take your shoes off, your home. In the pictures, the home that is for rent is located on the second floor, very similar to a town home layout. A separate, private, and fenced, side entrance, and private parking leads to the private entrance to the guest home on the second floor, and is out of sight and out of mind in this secluded bit of heaven. Approximately 5-10 minutes drive to Poway Farmer's Market (held on Saturdays), Trails, DMV, Post Office, Shops, Restaurants, Movie Theaters, Pomerado Hospital and Palomar Medical Center. Approx. 10-15 minutes drive to Poway Business Park: General Atomics, Sysco San Diego, Geico Corp Office, Teledyne RD Instruments, Costco Wholesale and Home Depot, Lowe and Westfield North County Mall. Approx. 15 minutes drive to Rancho Bernardo Business Park: Apple Campus, Sony Electronics, General Atomics Aeronautical Systems, Petco Headquarters and more. Great hiking to Lake Poway, Iron Mountain and Mount Woodson's Potato Chip Rock. Approx. 20 minutes drive to Highland Valley Vineyards for Wine Tasting, Safari Park Approx. 25 minutes drive to Palomar Health/ Medical Center Escondido, or south to Qualcomm HQ Approx. 30 minutes drive to SD International Airport, Sorrento Valley, Rady Children's Hospital, Sharp Memorial Hospital, Fashion Valley and Westfield Mission Valley Malls, Del Mar Racetrack and the Beaches. house_ger.name: 2br 1.5bath RANCHETTE HOME ADU GRANNY FLAT QUITE SECLUSION POND CREEK
house_ger.msg: QR Code Link to This Post Poway Lake | Ramona Lake | Mt Woodsen boarder 2Br 1.5Bath Granny Flat, guest house, studio, home on 80 acre Ranch, seclusion, private pond creek and Archie Moore's 1950's dam, waterfall, and pond on a private creek. Free water, free sewer, free propane/gas, and free trash, electricity is based on usage, washing machine hookups in unit. New appliance throughout, new fridge, new stove, new bath, 9' extra tall ceilings and air conditioning. History of the Ranch from CBS news: (Copy and past this into google) YouTube Archie Moore's Salt Mine in San Diego County in 1959 Sean 619 3OO 33 five1 Texting me your simple details is easiest for me. How many adults, kids, dogs cats, giraffes, what you do for employment, your favored lease length, ect. No drugs, non smoking, boring, law abiding, law enforcement friendly, and respectful, is what we're looking for. Standard background checks will be performed. If you have a current LIVE Scan available, or proof of military clearances, are big bonus'. Located in the middle of Archie Moore's old property and his "Salt Mine" Boxing Camp. The pad for his pools, 2 homes and boxing ring still rests under the 350 year old coastal oak trees. Your back yard and cultasac is the indoor training ring Mohamed Ali nick named the "Bucket of Blood", and is detailed in both of Archie and Mohamed's, World Champion Boxing Biography books. George Foreman trained and learned to box in these hills, along with numerous other world class boxers and Navy Golden Gloves over the years. The back yard and rest of the acreage is a resort with a waterfall that can put you to sleep at night. Mt Woodson Country Club, the "Million Dollar Golf Course Bridges", along with the Mt Woodson Castle is down your private drive. World class rock bouldering is at your fingertips in the front and back yards. The widely known, Mt Woodson Hiking Trail and Potatoe Chip Rock is a 5 minute drive away, or a hike down the back yard, with the Iron Mountain Hiking trail head 10 minutes down the road. You can hike directly to Potato Chip Rock from your back door, the Grass Land Preserve is around the corner and also hike able from your door, where a pair of Golden Eagles migrate in from Alaska to breed every year. The micro climate is like no other in Southern California. 360* of seclusion, and 80 acres of coastal oak trees surround you. The coastal marine layer often rolls past the back window in the evenings, through your canyon, as the photos show. 3 juvenile night time owls are a stones throws away to keep you company and sing you to sleep. Neighborly, pet chickens and organic eggs are a short walk across the way. Open access to a private tennis court may be available as well, if thats your thing. Mt Woodson Elementary School is biking distance for a 5th grader, and ranks 9 out of 10 in the state. Poway's, In-n-Out Burger, Costco and Home Depot are 12 minutes away, yet you're in the middle of the "Ramona Valley Vineyard Association" on the "West End" on your own private ranch with 100'snof open acres surrounding you. Commuting is a breeze compared to down town Poway or down town Ramona because there are no stop lights to contend with in the morning on Hwy 67. 1 stop light gets you Scripps Poway Parkway, and 7 more miles gets you to the 15 Freeway. It is the ideal commuting location to Qualcom, General Atomics, Claremont, Kearney Mesa, NAS Mira Mar Base, Mira Mesa, La Jolla, Sony, the Apple Campus, or north to Escondido and those hospitals and buisness parks. Optional RV, Trailer or Boat parking is available, but not included . Horse amenities are available as well. The round pen can be seen in the helicopter arial image. It's a property that most folks spend a lifetime of work and a career to be able to retire in. We'd like to share it with you. It truly is God's country, and the very place a ridiculously wealthy, World Champion, Light Heavy Weight Boxer (1952-1963), Archie Moore decided to call home. He could have lived anywhere in the world as he traveled to Paris, Peru, London and South America to fight in the late 1950's, yet, he chose this property to call home and to train on. I think I've layed it on thick enough, come take a gander for yourself, Ill give you the tour... Come, stretch out, take your shoes off, your home. In the pictures, the home that is for rent is located on the second floor, very similar to a town home layout. A separate, private, and fenced, side entrance, and private parking leads to the private entrance to the guest home on the second floor, and is out of sight and out of mind in this secluded bit of heaven. Approximately 5-10 minutes drive to Poway Farmer's Market (held on Saturdays), Trails, DMV, Post Office, Shops, Restaurants, Movie Theaters, Pomerado Hospital and Palomar Medical Center. Approx. 10-15 minutes drive to Poway Business Park: General Atomics, Sysco San Diego, Geico Corp Office, Teledyne RD Instruments, Costco Wholesale and Home Depot, Lowe and Westfield North County Mall. Approx. 15 minutes drive to Rancho Bernardo Business Park: Apple Campus, Sony Electronics, General Atomics Aeronautical Systems, Petco Headquarters and more. Great hiking to Lake Poway, Iron Mountain and Mount Woodson's Potato Chip Rock. Approx. 20 minutes drive to Highland Valley Vineyards for Wine Tasting, Safari Park Approx. 25 minutes drive to Palomar Health/ Medical Center Escondido, or south to Qualcomm HQ Approx. 30 minutes drive to SD International Airport, Sorrento Valley, Rady Children's Hospital, Sharp Memorial Hospital, Fashion Valley and Westfield Mission Valley Malls, Del Mar Racetrack and the Beaches. Approx. 30-45 minutes drive to Downtown San Diego. SD International Airport, Balboa Park and Museums, Old Town, SD Zoo, Sea World, LEGOLAND Park, SD Botanic Garden

craigslist.title: Perfect Studio in Best Area of Ocean Beach - AVAILABLE JULY 14TH
craigslist.location: 1739 SUNSET CLIFFS BLVD near DEL MONTE
craigslist.full_address: 1739 SUNSET CLIFFS BLVD near DEL MONTE
craigslist.geocode_query: 1739 SUNSET CLIFFS BLVD near DEL MONTE
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Beautiful- ground floor - quiet studio - 3 Blocks to the beach in best area of Ocean Beach! AVAILABLE JULY 13TH. FREE water, FREE gas, FREE trash, FREE landscaping, and on-site management. Call for an appointment to see it. Rarely available. EXTRAS include an outside common BBQ with Adirondack chair seating outside your door for your enjoyment in the grassy courtyard and laundry room on-site and private bike storage. There are 8 parking spaces for 12 units, so it's first come first serve and no guest parking. It is situated in a well-maintained, landscaped 12-unit complex named the OB.Seagull. The area is an ideal semi-residential location only 3 blocks from the ocean. It is a 10-minute drive to downtown San Diego and the airport and a one block walk to shops, restaurants and Newport, Avenue which is downtown Ocean Beach. PERFECTION. This unit has a brand-new kitchen with lots of dark wood cabinets, new stainless-steel stove and fridge, granite countertops, ceiling fan, new hardwood flooring, new doors, and newer windows. Ocean Beach is a small beach community, living with locals and away from the hubbub of downtown or the extreme beach scene but close enough to still enjoy it. It is one of San Diego's most relaxing places, which makes us a great alternative to luxury apartments in San Diego and Mission Valley, CA. While residing with us, you can go to the beach, of course, or shop on Newport Avenue. The year-round sunshine allows for year-round attractions too. Visit the longest pier on the west coast, the Ocean Beach Pier, or enjoy the vast collection of antique stores, bars, and restaurants. This community is known for its unique neighborhoods, beautiful parks, playgrounds and sports Go to YouTube and type "OCEAN BEACH SEAGULL APARTMENTS IN SAN DIEGO" for a wonderful video of our Ocean Beach location. NO PETS. Deposit same as the rent. Call for an appointment to see it.

Nestled in a peaceful, gated community on the La Mesa/Spring Valley border, our 1-bedroom units are the ideal blend of luxury, convenience, and affordability. What You’ll Love: Spacious 1BR layouts w/ huge private patios or balconies Massive, mirrored closets = tons of storage Gorgeous mountain views right from your unit No hidden fees, ever. Seriously. Location Perks: Minutes to Downtown San Diego, beaches, and shopping Quick freeway access = an easy commute anywhere Tucked away in the tranquil foothills of Casa de Oro Community Highlights: Resort-style pool = vacation vibes every day 24-hour laundry room = no more late-night laundromat runs Smoke-free, quiet community Pet-free = peaceful, allergy-friendly living Resident satisfaction is our top priority. Come see why so many love calling Casa de Helix home. More photos & info: www.CasaDeHelixApartments.com

craigslist.title: Swimming Pool, Fitness Center, Laundry Facilities
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post 606 3rd Ave, San Diego, CA 92101 Located in the heart of downtown San Diego, Market Street Square is surrounded by the eclectic charm of a neighborhood full of history, outstanding shopping, fine dining and an enviable nightlife. Our lively community is within walking distance of Horton Plaza, the historic Gaslamp Quarter, San Diego Trolley line, PetCo Park Baseball Stadium, and just a short distance from the San Diego Bay. Our light and spacious studio, one- and two-bedroom apartment homes provide a comfortable retreat after a long day. Amenities such as a sparkling swimming pool, a dry heat sauna, two rooftop sundecks, a Jacuzzi spa and deluxe fitness center provide first-class living all the way. Market Street Square is the ideal place to call home. Choose from a variety of floor plan options to match your needs, and rest assured each of our thoughtfully designed apartments is packed with contemporary necessities and sophisticated touches. The open-concept layouts at Market Street Square leave plenty of room for your belongings, your lifestyle, and your aesthetic. Beyond your doorstep, we’ve curated a selection of resort-style community perks that will inspire you to plan your next vacation as a staycation. You’ll find spaces to relax and unwind and places to gather with friends. Features Include: Barbecue Area Laundry Facilities Recreation Room Swimming Pool Secured Entrance Sauna Fitness Center 2 Rooftop Sundecks Courtesy Guard Jacuzzi Call: show contact info For more information, visit us at: https://livegkmanagement.com/7a7fky7r/market-st-square Pricing and availability are subject to change daily. craigslist.title: A++ LOCATION.....Beach Studio - Steps to Shops and Sand
craigslist.location: 1739 Sunset Cliffs Blvd #4 near Del Monte
craigslist.full_address: 1739 Sunset Cliffs Blvd #4 near Del Monte
craigslist.geocode_query: 1739 Sunset Cliffs Blvd #4 near Del Monte
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Best Area Available August 1st. This ground floor studio is situated in a well-maintained pretty landscaped 12-unit complex called the OB.Seagull. The area is an ideal semi-residential location only 3 blocks from the ocean. It is a 13 - minute drive to downtown San Diego and the airport and a one block walk to shops, restaurants and Newport Avenue which is downtown Ocean Beach. Quiet Too. This unit has newer windows, a roomy kitchen, a ceiling fan, tiled bath, newer carpet and paint. There is an outside common BBQ with Adirondack chair seating outside your door in the grassy courtyard. There are 8 parking spaces for 12 units so it's first come first serve and no guest parking. Laundry room is also on-site. TWO VIDEOS ON YOUTUBE 1. type in "OCEAN BEACH SEAULL APARTMENTS IN SAN DIEGO" for a drone video of the place. 2. https://youtu.be/3C3bJQfdqcQ?si=H7VQqTLI-BqLBzwV e FREE WATER, FREE TRASH, FREE GAS. No pets, 6-month lease. Security Deposit is the same as the rent. Call for an appointment to see it.

craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Shasta Lane Apartments Bedroom: 1 | Bathroom: 1 Square Footage: 750 sq ft Monthly Price: $2095 - $2145 *Optional and usage-based charges not included. Contact office to confirm pricing details and included fees. Call us today! show contact info Community Description Tucked away in the "Jewel of the Hills," Shasta Lane Apartments welcomes you with towering pine trees, the flutter of butterflies, and the gentle songs of birds. Step outside your door to explore nearby Lake Murray, where scenic trails and sparkling waters await. Become a regular at local favorites like Smokey and the Brisket, and enjoy everyday conveniences with Vons, Costco, Walmart, and Target just around the corner. For a little more adventure, stroll the charming La Mesa downtown village with boutique shops, events, and dining experiences. Our location makes it easy to enjoy all that San Diego County offers, with quick access to the I-8, I-15, 125, and 805 freeways. Whether it's beaches, amusement parks, or vibrant neighborhoods, everything is within reach. At home, relax in spacious apartments filled with natural light. Enjoy big windows, sliding glass doors to your private patio or balcony, and thoughtful touches like large wardrobe closets and included kitchen appliances. Stay connected with pre-installed WiFi from Cox, including one month of complimentary service at move-in. Take advantage of our 24-hour laundry facilities, assigned parking, pool, spa, and clubhouse. At Shasta Lane Apartments, you're going to love where you live! At Pulse Millenia Apartments, we offer an unparalleled selection of amenities designed to enhance every aspect of our residents' lives. Dive into luxury with our resort-style swimming pool and expansive sun deck, perfect for soaking up the California sun or enjoying a refreshing swim. Stay active and energized in our state-of-the-art fitness center, complete with cardio and strength training equipment. Entertain friends and family in our stylish clubhouse, featuring a gourmet kitchen and cozy lounge areas. For those who work from home or need a quiet space to focus, our business center provides the perfect environment. And for furry friends, our pet-friendly community includes a spacious dog park where they can play and socialize. With additional perks like controlled-access parking, package lockers, and on-site maintenance, Pulse Millenia ensures that every convenience is at your fingertips. Experience luxury living redefined with our exceptional amenities tailored to your lifestyle. Up to $2,500 off when you move into select homes by 7/16/26 on a 12+ month term!* *RESTRICTIONS APPLY.
